Before anyone could stop her, she opened a door and entered the enclosure. She approached a lone gharial and tried to coax it towards the exit.

Everyone gasped in shock when the gharial turned and bit her in the arm. In response, the guards scrambled to close the door as the wounded woman pounded on it; begging to be released. Suddenly she stopped banging and looked at her hands in terror – even from a distance, I could see them starting to change.

My sense of curiosity got the better of me as I slowly approached the railing overlooking the enclosure. The woman’s fingers had merged to form three claws on each hand; followed soon after by patches of green beginning to move up her arms.
Sensing someone behind me, I turned to see Malura standing nearby, “What’s happening to her?”

“She’s paying the price for her stupidity.” Looking at me, she said, “She’s turning into a gharial.”

I turned back just in time to see the woman lean forward as her arms bent at an impossible angle. It wasn’t long before she was standing on all fours like the others in the enclosure. Next her head started changing – her nose and jaw grew into a snout, with the species’ sharp teeth jutting out from the sides. A second set of eyes formed just below the first set as a series of spikes appeared on her back; ripping her clothes to shreds.

It wasn’t much longer before the former woman was just another gharial in the enclosure – acting as thought she’d always been one. I watched as the gharial who’d bitten her started to circle her; I quickly realized what it was doing. The few guards who hadn’t escorted the protestors out were busy ushering everyone from the room. The last thing I saw as I was escorted out, was the two gharial mating with each other.
11111111111111111111111111111121.title: Trouble Ensues

111111111111111111111111111111211.content:
After the incident with the gharial, the zoo leadership thought it would be smart to close early for the day. I couldn’t blame them for that; after all they had to investigate everything that happened and couldn’t do that with people milling about.

Security checked everyone at the exit to make sure we weren’t exposed; a process which took an hour. Once Malura and I were safely in the runabout, I looked at her and said, “What’s going to happen to the new gharial?”

“Considering what they were doing when we left, I’m sure they’ll want to see if she gets pregnant.” Looking at me, Malura said, “If that’s the case then it will be big news; as no gharial has ever gotten pregnant in captivity.”

Looking out the front window as Malura programmed in a random destination, I said, “I wonder what that transformation was like for her. Do you think she felt any pain?”

“I imagine that it was a very painful and traumatic experience for her, Olivia.” Glancing at me, Malura said, “I pray that you never find yourself in a position where you find out for yourself.”

No one said a word for a few moments as the runabout entered the highway. After a moment, I said, “What should we do now?”
“I was wondering that myself; perhaps we could do something to get our minds off what happened. Or, if you’d like, we could go home.”

Glancing at Malura, I said, “Let’s say we didn’t go home; what did you have in mind?”

“We’re not far from an entertainment complex, what humans would call an arcade.” Looking at me, Malura said, “If memory serves, they have several binejuc courts; perhaps we could play a game?”

I took a minute to consider my options; and I’d be lying if a part of me wanted to go home. But another part of me wanted to explore my new home. “Let’s go to that entertainment complex; after hearing about it from Narek and the others, I want to see what this binejuc is all about.”
111111111111111111111111111111211.title: Continue

151.content:
Humans:
• Olivia Sheppard (Main Character) – 17 year old High School student.
• Eric Sheppard – Olivia’s younger brother.
• Brian & Laura Sheppard – Olivia and Eric’s parents
• Melissa Rogers, Amy Etheridge, and Kyle Peterson – Olivia’s best friends; Kyle is also her boyfriend. Amy is an out lesbian.

Maltorians:
• Qu’ris & M’gan D’Pkeni – Qu’ris is a healer (Doctor), while M’gan is a xeno-anthropologist. Parents of D’ana and Narek
• D’ana D’Pkeni – oldest child of Qu’ris and M’gan.
• Narek D’Pkeni – younger brother of D’ana
• Sorain D’Sora – a childhood friend of D’ana; younger sister of Maiya
• Asura Telfani – friend of Narek’s; a lesbian
• Maiya D’Sora – A mercy (nurse); older sister, and legal guardian, of Sorain.
• Jervix & Malura Telfani – Asura’s parents.
151.title: Character Profiles

152.content:
Terminology:
• Binejuc – a game similar to basketball; played in zero-gravity
• Penghou – bears a resemblance to Earth squid. It is still alive when eaten.
• Neshta – a fruit similar to a mango; can be turned into a grayish juice
• No’kata – a species that is analogous to tuna.
• Pan’gu – similar in taste to Earth chickens.
• Healer – the Maltorian equivalent to Doctor.
• Mercy – the Maltorian equivalent to Nurse.
• Va’lasho – a biological process that Maltorian girls undergo; it signals they’re ready for physical relations. In order to prevent temporary madness, they must have sex.

Cultural Information:
• Maltorians worship a goddess known as Chrestus; they’re a deeply religious people.
• Maltorians eat every meal naked.
152.title: Terminology & Cultural Information

153.content:
Non-Sentient Species:

• Vulcits: carnivorous bear-like creatures, stand on two feet. Live in packs
• Klasians: burrowing creatures that are the size of house cats. Spit rocks from its gullet in self-defense
153.title: Other Species

info.brief_description: A hike in the woods brings a young woman into contact with an alien race.
info.description:
Olivia Sheppard is hiking in the Appalachian Mountains with her friends; until a freak accident transports her to an alien planet.

Rules:
1. There can be sex but not overly descriptive.
2. Please use proper spelling and grammar.
3. Don't kill Olivia or the core characters.
4. Use 1st Person Perspective
